entries.gt_000739771a1289: Boy with an empty milk can
entries.gt_012daf316e9d9f: If the pot whistles three times, somebody is lying.
entries.gt_040628407bb7ea: Three packs of pills, and I will persuade the sick to keep quiet until the next siren.
entries.gt_042b30dcf4f283: If anyone asks, you found the key under the mat. There was never any mat here.
entries.gt_058b5edf4573da: Quiet chain to the Communal Ring
entries.gt_05c56db5ecfe63: But you will have water, a key, and time to run to the next door.
entries.gt_0610c706e47e12: Return four bandages to the post. After the siren, I will remember who held the dressing.
entries.gt_072e3d7f1df401: The Wild press from below, the Liquidators from above. We are here between an order and hunger.
entries.gt_085a94966be890: Empty Neighbor: Liza is ready to be a witness. Tell Barni about the pass, the apartment number, and the empty reflection.
entries.gt_085b982f5ab4e0: Apartments: Lyokha runs black exchange by the Pharmacy Exchange door.
entries.gt_092a58b5fadb9b: If you have no money, go below. Just do not step on the wire; it is nervous here.
entries.gt_09659af6775eb3: If the cabinet is empty, the corridor gets treated with a rifle butt.
entries.gt_099a4ec7af7629: The Svod idol no longer holds the quiet shelter. The black palm remains only as a trace.
entries.gt_0b04ff579942a6: take the complaint by the entrance and leave, if you are not ready for a close reveal
entries.gt_0dfe2c14729d5d: The Chernobog Svod supply list was carried out to the neighbors.
entries.gt_0e21abaacfeef0: Break two Rebar, and people will start going through in more than single file again.
entries.gt_0ec7e4bc49af15: You can leave. Everyone here pretends there is still a choice.
entries.gt_0ee71fb93a73c8: If you want to test it in a fight, lead it to the lamp and tables. It is faster in a dark corner.
entries.gt_10d6aa76fd251a: The ballots went into the account. The route to eighty-eight now knows your name.
entries.gt_110270d6073a91: The complaint is out of the room, and for now that is enough for me.
entries.gt_123a63276a160f: Lida Sitechko: "Get the forged ration card from the gas box. With an item, I am a witness; without it, just noise."
entries.gt_12fd569924bb06: Lyuba with the Stool: "Two Rebar are twitching in the lower gap. Break them, or go around one by one."
entries.gt_13a419dc2e01a9: take the fake pass from the near table and keep your distance from the far tenant
entries.gt_152363ca84e969: The palm can be scrubbed away. The address does not forget it right away.
entries.gt_15f2fc8f6ccdfb: The Ring wants quiet, the market wants a percentage. I want a passage where I can shoot in a line.
entries.gt_15f5c828219529: The Chernobog Svod reserve was taken as someone else's shelter.
entries.gt_16c35405feab93: If you want not to shoot, take the paper to Barni. Liquidators like witnesses more than loud corpses.
entries.gt_18595091b53360: The water coupons went into a private dry cache.
entries.gt_18abe3a81a9f5a: The antidepressants went to a Wild exchange for passage and silence.
entries.gt_197cab2b4bfb1e: The Liquidators received the black palm act. The quiet block stopped being just a rumor.
entries.gt_1a195dd3099d04: Rudnev returned the bandages to Liquidator accounting and closed children's access to the reserve.
entries.gt_1aa25ba308a605: Everyone argues about justice. The living argue longer.
entries.gt_1b3ee766ac8534: A witness without an item is just noise with a name here.
entries.gt_1baea6b60a05cb: Apartments: Sanyok's gas box in the Communal Kitchen; forged card required
entries.gt_1e116244403fe1: two Rebar stand by the barricade combat gap; they show as red diamonds for the active KILL quest
entries.gt_210d33405145ea: Feofan by the Pot: "Steal the borrowed kitchen key from Raya's cabinet. Without the key, Raya holds the kitchen by yelling."
entries.gt_23402f5d96961f: A bribe is quieter, repair is more honest, a fight is faster. The bypass is longest of all.
entries.gt_2441d3cb31ab05: Serafima Sheptunya: "Three packs of pills for those who hear the wall too loudly."
entries.gt_29a5470a23f8eb: Do not argue with the queue out loud. Even the witnesses here stand by list.
entries.gt_29eef6734600cb: If the siren is silent in only one room, it is not luck.
entries.gt_2a4bc9cfd50162: Lyokha Menyala: "Two antidepressants, and I will not get in your way at the door."
entries.gt_2a90cc73ae3df0: The first number is not human. But the queue around him is people.
entries.gt_2cf1f9eeaf1bcf: Ocherednik let you pass by coupon without a fight
entries.gt_2fca9c3e793124: Whoever holds the stove holds the floor.
entries.gt_31b11775023821: If the departmental box is touched without clearance, it is theft before witnesses.
entries.gt_328b3598d11c22: The choice is simple: narrow order or broad crush.
entries.gt_339fb010ff5572: Belik Dry Act: "Bring me the black palm act from the Svod. The room must become an address, not a miracle."
entries.gt_3425a5b6fce54e: Anya From the List: "Steal the Svod kitchen list. Bread has to go back to the neighbors, not into the palm."
entries.gt_34de9ccec59a21: Apartments: sealed complaint on the Communal Kitchen witness table
entries.gt_37b50e119f84b3: Empty Neighbor: Mertsaev warns that if you get close, it will reveal itself. Lead the Unperson to the light and kill it.
entries.gt_37df8285ad38bf: The barricade stayed aside. The lower creak fades behind the wall.
entries.gt_383920edf6d3e5: This is not a kitchen. It is a negotiating room with boiling water.
entries.gt_38652f6bad52e0: At the Crossroads they shoot, in the Ring they remember, at the market they count. Choose where you will live next.
entries.gt_38836fcf461309: The Empty Neighbor revealed itself up close and was liquidated.
entries.gt_3a6242a78a508e: Bread went down the chain. The Communal Ring holds a quiet bypass today.
entries.gt_3ae74368d743bb: Witness ledger: whoever shot in the queue gets written down without a number.
entries.gt_3b729aa8928a50: Tell Nina: pity is not sterile.
entries.gt_3ba6b480116147: I need cigarettes. Eight packs, and today the gas will be on my side, not Raya's.
entries.gt_3c89c52d3c9174: Theft is quieter than a fight only until the first witness.
entries.gt_3c9f35af27597c: The water dispute was bypassed through a private dry cache.
entries.gt_3ddfd32584dfb3: The first number's card is too smooth. Get the forgery, and the crowd will move him aside itself.
entries.gt_3e24666a2ab4e0: Hit him here, and witnesses will remember not the beast, but your hand.
entries.gt_3ef2aa82498bc8: We need pipes. Three pipes, and the leaf will stop eating shoulders.
entries.gt_3f1f44e43f0fd2: If the paper votes correctly, the door pretends it has known you since childhood.
entries.gt_3fb77c258c452f: Twelve ballots, and I will run the caravan as if it were just a queue for groats.
entries.gt_4022fc6b0a8b98: Do not touch the left stove. It considers itself head of sector.
entries.gt_40fdc9218d40ed: If you give the pills to Rudnev, he will close the cabinet. If you give them to me, he will cover his face.
entries.gt_4116613f52bfd6: Everyone reflects in the cabinet screen except him. There is a stain, no person.
entries.gt_421402360a0d79: The Liquidators have bandages, the Wild have pills, the children have fever. And everyone calls it order.
entries.gt_424001e75417af: Market eighty-eight will buy any route, then sell your surname back to you.
entries.gt_4271c6a00ac578: Do not put the cabinet right against the door. When the fog comes, the cabinet will be the first to ask out.
entries.gt_42eafae89dbd38: Thirty-seventh is my door again. Almost.
entries.gt_43046c73498986: The paid passage through the barricade was bought from Raya Prokhodnaya.
entries.gt_439e7adb2d7247: The Empty Neighbor was handed to the Liquidators before close reveal.
entries.gt_477db7c610dfb9: Rudnev Perevyazochny: "Four bandages back to the post. Without dressings, a sweep becomes an execution."
entries.gt_47ea1346629208: An Unperson does not reveal itself until a person closes the distance. That is its politeness.
entries.gt_4968abf4675e5b: Tell Raya I did not touch her ladle. Today.
entries.gt_4a408bf4bf384f: Empty Neighbor exposed by checking the pass against the apartment number
entries.gt_4a43d853f9c1cc: There is a passage. And now there is a rumor too.
entries.gt_4b6e6d3b5ef770: Everyone saw the forgery. The queue grew shorter not by a corpse, but by a lie.
entries.gt_4b83e10dc50cf9: Apartments: wet queue and coupons that can be carried off to the Wild.
entries.gt_4ce7861caf621c: The barricade's lower combat gap was cleared of living Rebar.
entries.gt_4f8448ec6ffcd5: Four packs of pills will give us one night without screaming from forty-six.
entries.gt_50874d57a022b1: A pot lid is stronger than any protocol if you hit on time.
entries.gt_512e501e0bef99: Sanyok received the cigarettes and held the gas side of the kitchen.
entries.gt_53f4117c31ac0a: Raya is kind while the knife handle points toward her.
entries.gt_53fa1024547c1c: Water coupons went to the Wild past the queue.
entries.gt_54670a64f3ef95: The pills were given to the whisperer; the sick grew quieter, but the children got no help.
entries.gt_55826212ccb581: Fine, the gas is open. But this is not a truce, it is a smoke break.
entries.gt_560220d3bc5a98: If Raya asks, the key went to common order.
entries.gt_564962fbb9a426: If the market courier asks for the password, say: "the queue is shorter when they pay in advance".
entries.gt_56825c63749162: Water coupons returned to the Liquidators' ledger.
entries.gt_56d8c632913de2: Witness statements about the Empty Neighbor went to the Liquidators
entries.gt_5735a17bd4442c: The iron fit. Now the span at least creaks with confidence.
entries.gt_5f1fa16935875c: This is not a medpost, it is an exchange of bodily terms.
entries.gt_5f308708e9f495: Thirty-five rubles, and I remember that you have lived here a long time.
entries.gt_5f7516b6ec3c36: Apartments: Communal Kitchen feud, cigarettes for Sanyok's side
entries.gt_6066cabb48cfc4: The side passage counts as a queue if you walk silently and with a coupon.
entries.gt_61324f415566ba: The children's corner was saved with water and starts trusting the Pharmacy Exchange.
entries.gt_613849ad106635: The children's corner remembered the theft from the map and ration.
entries.gt_61590765b5b1ac: I saw who planted the card, but I saw it through a sieve. Courts do not like that.
entries.gt_627f8efbe24d78: Serygin hides coupons, Zoya asks nicely. I propose faster.
entries.gt_6315f761f68f18: Zoya by the Standpipe: "Four bottles of water to the queue, before people go for the Liquidator box."
entries.gt_634b4a6cfb5ae8: The Communal Kitchen was held with food instead of a fight.
entries.gt_63eec31c8c9899: I wrote the complaint not about noise. About silence. His silence walks around the room.
entries.gt_64e91be7a6aca5: Folder for the cut to the Crossroads
entries.gt_656ad79bf7a371: Dry Pocket: "Two water coupons into private reserve. Let the queue, the Liquidator, and the Wild blame each other."
entries.gt_65f581bb4053aa: Apartments: quiet cult block with black palms and an emergency screen.
entries.gt_661c0ee619eb3a: Apartments: mark and erase the black palm in the quiet block.
entries.gt_66c3b7c2dd2cae: The borrowed kitchen key was carried out of Raya's cabinet.
entries.gt_67ad889c1cc686: The Svod black palm was covered over with a cleaning kit.
entries.gt_680f5795082799: paid leaf is marked on the map beside Raya; a bribe is cheaper than a fight, but the neighbors will hear it
entries.gt_693ff13bea091d: You can pity the queue. You cannot give it the keys to the standpipe.
entries.gt_6ae3f6723eba07: The medical reserve was returned to the Liquidator post by ledger.
entries.gt_6bb6dc81cdac53: Tell the Liquidator: the queue for boiling water is not outside the law.
entries.gt_6c3571a4e07b07: The supply list went to the tenants. The Svod still has the palm, but not the rations.
entries.gt_6cc22e8d606434: Now leave by the side passage. If the first number looks after you, do not answer.
entries.gt_6df502b57e7066: It got quieter. That means the wall is chewing.
entries.gt_6f9e254bd8d6ce: The mark holds on soot, varnish, and fear. A cleaning kit is sometimes stronger than prayer.
entries.gt_70417d981c2bef: If you see chalk on the floor as an arrow outward, that is our move. If the arrow is wet, do not go.
entries.gt_711c9cef551499: Do not go closer than the cabinet. The linoleum is already blackening there.
entries.gt_712bec51b3a2c0: Kostyl Kanistrovy: "Four water coupons, and I will not tear open the standpipe with a crowbar in front of the children."
entries.gt_7183c295ca446a: Ocherednik dismantled through a forged card
entries.gt_718b307d19f821: The bandages are in place. Today the post does not shoot every coughing person.
entries.gt_71bdcba34d4f28: They wrote me into a shelter with fewer places than surnames. That is not care; it is a queue into someone else's palm.
entries.gt_72181ea8aad992: Nina Tabletkina: "Four packs of pills for the children. Otherwise this corridor will listen to their fever all night."
entries.gt_72e929096d4072: Efim Svershchik: "Find the first number's forged ration card. Paper will carry him out of the queue by itself."
entries.gt_745db2635c3949: The Chernobog Svod anchor idol was destroyed.
entries.gt_756ec711691483: Kostyl led the coupons into the wet black market. The queue grew drier, but the Wild open a side passage.
entries.gt_757f49af53eaba: If you want to leave, leave. But dry hands come back on their own later.
entries.gt_7582e75b580f47: Access to the reserve is not a right, but discipline.
entries.gt_76205a5509c3b3: Do not widen the passage. Wide passages like other people's boots.
entries.gt_7682021850cd5e: The Svod no longer looks accidental. That is almost victory.
entries.gt_7732ce0a9f35b8: Number 38 is crossed out. Number 38 is standing again. Do not argue out loud.
entries.gt_7835c036c7b428: Not every exchange is visible in the logbook. Some write on skin.
entries.gt_7855beeb67b3b6: Kipyatkov from the Bypass: "Bring me the sealed complaint. I will call a squad and seal the stove before first blood."
entries.gt_7a0092fe752097: The neighbors are whispering again. That is better than not talking at all.
entries.gt_7a7368493a3a28: Nina looks like a doctor. Rudnev looks like a protocol. I look like a man with a pipe.
entries.gt_7afa169450fd9c: I remembered your face from the correct side of the sieve.
entries.gt_7be1261cd0f2e1: I counted the tail: there is one more in the queue than there are people in the corridor.
entries.gt_7c6dcd72654924: Apartments: water distribution by the standpipe, common barrel, and departmental box.
entries.gt_7c8b373746d730: Apartments: the idol stands inside the marked quiet block.
entries.gt_7e8ac35bfaf060: Vera vouched for the player; Nina opened the conversation about children's medicine.
entries.gt_7ffcb907d245e2: Lyokha received the antidepressants and left the passage behind the player.
entries.gt_806eea3a5c2637: Complaint accepted. The squad likes being called before blood.
entries.gt_807106f7881ee8: The Svod does not hide people. The Svod remembers who came to hide on their own.
entries.gt_81544709999a19: Belik Dry Act: "When you understand where the palm holds the room, break the Svod idol. Not before."
entries.gt_8255f16a0196a0: Apartments: a dry reseller stands by the water riot and sells a private way out.
entries.gt_83247c435a17ea: The Communal Ring is held not by walls, but by people who remember other people's doors.
entries.gt_837c481109297a: The Liquidator holds the cabinet, Nina holds the children, I hold the door. Choose who you trust.
entries.gt_86a9f31d74a71d: Raya Prokhodnaya: "Thirty-five rubles, and the paid leaf will pretend you are one of ours."
entries.gt_8bb0e833f17509: Three pipes for braces. Without iron, the passage becomes a throat, not a route.
entries.gt_8bf2287e273512: The children fell asleep. Now you can hear the adults arguing.
entries.gt_8d99dd16cb3647: The wall accepts pain, but pills make it talkative.
entries.gt_8ee63e134dd6a4: Everyone saw the card. Now they are arguing about the forgery, not about who is louder.
entries.gt_8f774e170e3708: The coupon worked. The queue let you through like an error in the ledger.
entries.gt_90702eb7721134: Outcome: hold the quiet chain to the Communal Ring. Marina Koltsevaya asks for four loaves for the neighbors by the doors.
entries.gt_94e6bfc6dd79c6: Your dry pocket is bought. Now do not rattle a bottle by the queue.
entries.gt_95925609e9c9a7: The Chernobog Svod reserve was spread among neighbors instead of the cell.
entries.gt_9602e36272a30c: Sanyok's gas box holds a forged ration card. Get it, and I will have an item, not just words.
entries.gt_96824b4b69d2c0: Four bottles of water, and the queue will disperse without swearing or blood. For today.
entries.gt_968a46b8c7bc58: Nina treats the body. Rudnev treats order. Lyokha treats the price.
entries.gt_969672f71fb778: A document and a witness save ammo. Ammo saves pride.
entries.gt_97a153685afd20: If Serygin asks, this is not mercy. It is putting out a fire before smoke.
entries.gt_96cdc7ccf181a1: The barricade leaf was braced with pipes; the short passage can be opened with a key.
entries.gt_995791495db521: Apartments: Communal Kitchen feud, five portions of kasha for a peaceful table
entries.gt_9a0b5a5577a59f: The Empty Neighbor revealed itself up close and left black slime
entries.gt_9a74521efccaa5: The numbers whisper in circles. The first is not first; he just stands closest to someone else's bread.
entries.gt_9a8d78693995e4: The black palm act was carried out of the Chernobog Svod.
entries.gt_9cf3425d85d0be: Water coupons are assigned to the Liquidators' ledger.
entries.gt_9d22848881d218: They must have a kitchen list. Take it, and the neighbors will at least understand where the bread disappeared.
entries.gt_9eaaab8b72ce0a: The map is not decoration. It marks the doors where they knock first.
entries.gt_9ed0fa830128fc: Keep the money. Not thanks - change for spoiled quiet.
entries.gt_9ef85f9fb511ff: The pills went to the children through Nina, not into accounting or resale.
entries.gt_9fdc78894131df: I left a passage. Narrow, mean, but a passage. A barricade without a passage is a grave.
entries.gt_a01225cff93b4c: Karpov repairs honestly. I open quickly. A fight opens loudly.
entries.gt_a0442f22b4b726: Liquidators do not like pots. They hide causes too often.
entries.gt_a2b933fd0cc9b5: Zoya got two bottles. Not out of pity - by calculation.
entries.gt_a39cf830d2d24a: The queue by the standpipe got water before the fight.
entries.gt_a3f43cbb41ec81: Now we have paper and a name that does not match the door.
entries.gt_a43e4854ba8b60: The paid passage is narrow. Do not linger in the leaf while Karpov is watching.
entries.gt_a5f3bec77755cd: The kitchen key should lie with the one who holds the queue, not the one who counts portions.
entries.gt_a73d22b098ec24: Do not touch the emergency reserve. It is someone else's exactly until the minute you decide to trust it.
entries.gt_a762f2fd63a1e8: Apartments: Nina trusts the children's request only after Vera's water and a personal handoff.
entries.gt_a7a28f9e90b578: Zoya wants to hand it out now. The Wild want to carry everything off. I want the floor to survive the night.
entries.gt_a8365454b2706c: Stolen? Even the air here belongs to someone else until you breathe it.
entries.gt_a939fcd0852b54: Nina received pills for the children after Vera vouched for you.
entries.gt_acf4edebd634f4: Lyuba Numernaya: "Show a water coupon, and I will lead you through the side passage without a fight."
entries.gt_ad145a4095bb25: Rudnev is angry more quietly than usual. That means he is counting.
entries.gt_ad3b691820d42d: Show a water coupon, and I will lead you sideways, without elbows or shots.
entries.gt_ae043b987001da: Queue, holster, crowbar - three ways to stay dry and foreign.
entries.gt_af015bd7d7ab3a: A kitchen fight without paper is household life. With paper, it is a squad call.
entries.gt_af43e1b786a5f4: repair, bribe, fight, or lower bypass
entries.gt_b0503e01eca4c1: The braces are set. The cut to the Crossroads will be noisy, but it will not collapse at once.
entries.gt_b07b2ad0eafeb0: Belik Dry Act: "Give me a cleaning kit. The palm needs to be covered so the shelter can hear the siren again."
entries.gt_b3c737799cf5b0: A pill in the hand is more honest than a coupon in the pocket.
entries.gt_b50eecfc1b2db6: You passed the barricade. Behind your back remains a choice the neighbors will remember.
entries.gt_b551751d2b49f9: The list went to the neighbors. Now their quiet is not free.
entries.gt_b57ce35dd8c65e: Pharmacy trust sank after the medicine theft.
entries.gt_b651f6a84ad8cc: The queue by the standpipe got water.
entries.gt_b657c0ab8a3a54: Empty Neighbor: Liza asks you to check the pass on the table by the entrance without approaching the silent tenant in the far corner.
entries.gt_b6cb66afa1f7e5: We open the cut, the patrol moves faster, but the crowd will hear boots before the siren.
entries.gt_b7f79a7784f28e: Now children go below only when it is their own fault.
entries.gt_b847f95c673897: Ocherednik forced open: witnesses remembered the shooter
entries.gt_b84bb0aea58328: Karpov Barrikadny: "Three pipes for braces. We repair the middle leaf, and the span stops being a throat."
entries.gt_b88097c001f082: pipes lie right in the barricaded span; the key opens the short repair leaf
entries.gt_b8dd220cab0908: Empty Neighbor: Kostya asks you to take the complaint at the threshold and not check the far tenant face to face.
entries.gt_b90e5bec8bad89: The standpipe hisses, and the queue is already speaking with fists.
entries.gt_b92ffdd70c6633: Two coupons to me, and I will show you a dry pocket. Not a solution. Survival.
entries.gt_b9f9db74cf1ead: Four loaves into the neighbor chain. The fed hold a door longer than the hungry.
entries.gt_bad0d66a041641: The Svod remembered the theft: the quiet started to look like an ambush.
entries.gt_bb192b1aa7f036: Water coupons went to Wild looters.
entries.gt_bb85dabd94ce2c: Zoya will call it betrayal. Serygin will call it a shortage. Kostyl will call it petty greed.
entries.gt_bbac7b225dde2a: Medicine goes by the list. Whoever is not on the list endures.
entries.gt_bce15709ea42e1: The complaint was taken, and the Empty Neighbor was not approached
entries.gt_c0d99201301887: You can stand. You can bypass. You can chop through. Just do not say afterward that nobody saw.
entries.gt_c162fefeae5cc4: Market eighty-eight does not ask to open the road. It asks how much silence about it costs.
entries.gt_c1c0c06140d587: You bought yourself a dry pocket instead of peace by the standpipe. Every side noticed the empty place in the queue.
entries.gt_c2bc7269115c3a: If you brought medicine here, it is already going back at another price.
entries.gt_c409dc268ab344: Bring five packs of kasha. I will feed everyone until they start dividing the stove and power again.
entries.gt_c71ebace507a9c: Apartments: departmental water box and Serygin's accounting by the standpipe.
entries.gt_c87da8fce00025: The barricade cuts the span into four moves: repair, pay, fight, or go below.
entries.gt_c8a8a52c3c2727: The Svod mark is covered by household chemicals and protocol. The room makes noise like an ordinary one.
entries.gt_cabb49887de97f: The queue dispersed with wet hands. Serygin is angry more quietly, Kostyl looks for another weakness.
entries.gt_caf59bbc995825: A coupon is not water. But without a coupon, they will not even let you near an empty bucket.
entries.gt_cb11b52c25ab26: Raya hides the borrowed key in the cabinet. Bring it, and we will open the kitchen without her yelling.
entries.gt_cc82383806527c: The Ring is slower, but there they ask your name before shooting.
entries.gt_cd1bfc69e9ed4d: If we give the passage to Borya's patrol, the children will go around through the crush.
entries.gt_ce6a668ffcf1bf: Sanyok twists the gas, Feofan whispers over the key, Lida counts witnesses, the Liquidator sniffs pots.
entries.gt_cee46d2ce34722: Whoever brought the protocol entered the order too. Just from the other side.
entries.gt_cf32d84da58746: Borya gives boots, Marina gives neighbors. I give a price and a way out without extra witnesses.
entries.gt_cff5681a690f39: Serygin is angry? Then the box was not empty.
entries.gt_d0866769ce19cc: There is kasha. Now they argue about salt, not power.
entries.gt_d14eaecb9f55d5: If anyone says this is illegal, let them hold the span with bare hands themselves.
entries.gt_d1fb785b739e7f: Do not hit him in front of children. Paper cuts quieter, and they remember it longer.
entries.gt_d32fb9afdf4ed3: The Chernobog Svod was presented to the Liquidators as a cell address.
entries.gt_d3623b5de1fe4d: Found a black palm act? Do not wave it in the corridor. Bring it to me, and the address becomes protocol.
entries.gt_d3bc7236043664: Do not fear the word "stolen". In a khrushch, everything once belonged to somebody.
entries.gt_d6344433d18295: The trace is black; the blood did not become human. So the neighbor was empty.
entries.gt_d6b15a953a3616: The Empty Neighbor's fake pass was checked before a witness.
entries.gt_d6ba7a59a71a64: The Liquidator counts bottles, Kostyl counts backs. We count children.
entries.gt_d6f040af336047: We have no spells. There is a list, rations, a quiet siren, and neighbors who do not ask a second time.
entries.gt_d9da0d6f33dcc7: Hit the idol only after you understand the room. Until then you are fighting furniture.
entries.gt_d9ecd1759e467d: There is a lower passage, but the iron bits there pretend they are furniture.
entries.gt_d9eff85a67e77c: While they recount surnames, the passage is free.
entries.gt_db37d9d94d3c3c: Nina hands out pills by pity, Lyokha sells by fear. Both spoil the accounting.
entries.gt_db3d47836197b6: Outcome: sell the bypass to Market 88. Sonya Eighth asks for twelve ballots for the caravan queue.
entries.gt_dbf9e0a6f6fd0a: Outcome: open the noisy cut to Manhattan Crossroads. Borya Prorez asks for three pipes for braces.
entries.gt_dc59aac5cabb3a: Apartments: Serafima asks for pills away from Nina and Liquidator accounting.
entries.gt_dcbb5e93ca49fc: Apartments: organized cult reserve near black palms.
entries.gt_de80c534e45aaa: Sanyok Konforka: "Eight packs of cigarettes, and I hold the gas against Raya's pot authority."
entries.gt_df4b2f3f740184: The door is ours for now. Pass quickly, before the price wakes up.
entries.gt_dff349dc443c1a: I do not ask where the medicine came from. I ask who it will manage to help.
entries.gt_e1150bf317ecf8: Water is issued by list. Whoever argues with the list argues with the holster.
entries.gt_e123c67812aae0: There is no god in this room. In this room there is the order of other people's rations, a silent siren, and a palm on the wall.
entries.gt_e1dd4996910adf: Apartments: Rudnev by the pharmacy cabinet accepts bandages in exchange for ammo and accounting.
entries.gt_e256789282e9c9: I need two antidepressants. Not for the soul, for negotiations.
entries.gt_e29f51ddc22e44: The Liquidators were called to the communal kitchen before the fight.
entries.gt_e5cf8b702ebbc9: He called himself Arkady from forty-second, but this door is thirty-seventh. The numbers on the plate did not change.
entries.gt_e5e3f97f25141e: Four water coupons, and I will not break open the standpipe with a crowbar in front of the children.
entries.gt_e63416f3b1ed1f: If you take the complaint, take it and leave. Let him stand there alone until rounds come.
entries.gt_e6e60815ee1559: Raya Skovorodkina: "Five packs of kasha for the common table. While people chew, they divide power worse."
entries.gt_e7fa65e8e187ce: If the room becomes quiet again, look not for a miracle, but a storeroom.
entries.gt_e89ab97baa2f0f: The Rebar is not twitching anymore. The stool is almost a stool again.
entries.gt_e91530f80cf6e3: Return six water coupons to the box. Then we will talk about bottles.
entries.gt_e92fff0581f03f: The stove is sealed for ten minutes. In GIGAHRUSH, that is already peace.
entries.gt_e94a132484767f: Write down the apartment number. Errors like this like to return through the register.
entries.gt_ea538c79309d43: The key is mine now. Raya will yell, but the door will open from our side.
entries.gt_eb62cde646f01b: The Chernobog Svod mark was sealed by household means.
entries.gt_effef19795bcca: Bypass: along the lamps, not through shoulders. Keep the coupon visible.
entries.gt_f0cbef06885723: Rudnev thinks this is theft. He did not hear the medicine begging on its own.
entries.gt_f12d7cf0c4abf4: Sit by the wall. Less crockery flies by the wall.
entries.gt_f16be5e8188eed: The witness carried the forged card into the kitchen's common argument.
entries.gt_f17bdea2b93b0e: Coupons are back in accounting. No shooting required for now.
entries.gt_f1a0270c8fc49d: The narrow leaf is not free. Only the lower bypass is free, and Rebar is moving there.
entries.gt_f38cc5123fd819: The room idol of the Svod was broken after the room's rule was revealed.
entries.gt_f56dd5ed4828be: Water came. Now the standpipe hisses quieter than people.
entries.gt_f5edb01860b164: The coupons are ours. The queue became shorter by one fear.
entries.gt_f6943e0b1c95b7: Serygin Vodouchet: "Six water coupons back into the ledger. Without accounting, the standpipe becomes a front."
entries.gt_f6b53bd537902e: Yasha Prolom: "Knock down the first number, and the passage will open. Only the queue will see exactly how."
entries.gt_f890c851d922fb: Serafima took the pills into cult quiet instead of the children's reserve.
entries.gt_f90af5c5fffc78: Need a sealed complaint. Then I will close the stove, not my eyes.
entries.gt_f92b8297a5e1d4: Do not lie on their cot during the siren. The Svod first counts those who believed.
entries.gt_f9442952a80a79: Manhattan Crossroads is not a street. It is a corridor that learned to crush people in lanes.
entries.gt_fa0e02eccff397: A queue is when the strong stand around for nothing.
entries.gt_fb1e7f4c75737a: The ledger is more important than the queue again. It got quieter by the standpipe, but water is now issued through a holster.
entries.gt_fc620605f0e1f4: The Empty Neighbor was bypassed: complaint taken without closing in.
entries.gt_fca00294af2151: Apartments: key in Raya's cabinet in the Communal Kitchen; theft can be witnessed
entries.gt_fd69d1b219a083: If the medicine went to the children, the wall is hungry. If it went to the wall, the children hear it better.
entries.gt_fdb3a95ec26124: The pass lies on the table by the entrance. Take the paper from there; do not approach him for a signature.
